sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 72:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 72:1
items.html: The first is lowering the bottom Hey from the Keter of the Nekudim to her place, to the Peh of Nekudim, and returning the YHV to the phase of HBD of Rosh. The second is a new light that is extended and breaches the Parsa, expanding to the NHY of the inner AK, and returning Bina and ZON to Atzilut. (Inner Observation, Item 18)
